Rules.InvariantScript: Text(CountRows(Filter(CRRequests, AIPSGTargetDate > DateAdd(Today(), 14, TimeUnit.Days), Not(CRStatus.Value In ["Closed","Approved","Rejected"]))))
Text(CountRows(Filter(CRRequests, AIPSGTargetDate <= DateAdd(Today(), 14, TimeUnit.Days), AIPSGTargetDate >= Today(), Not(CRStatus.Value In ["Closed","Approved","Rejected"]))))
Text(CountRows(Filter(CRRequests, Not(CRStatus.Value In ["Closed","Approved","Rejected"]), CountIf(CRStakeholderReviews, CRNumber.CRNumber = CRNumber, Not(RAGStatus.Value = "Green")) = 0)))
Text(CountRows(Filter(CRRequests, Not(CRStatus.Value In ["Closed","Approved","Rejected"]), CountIf(CRStakeholderReviews, CRNumber.CRNumber = CRNumber, RAGStatus.Value = "Amber") > 0)))
Text(CountRows(Filter(CRRequests, Not(CRStatus.Value In ["Closed","Approved","Rejected"]), CountIf(CRStakeholderReviews, CRNumber.CRNumber = CRNumber, RAGStatus.Value = "Red") > 0)))
Text(CountRows(Filter(CRRequests, Not(CRStatus.Value In ["Closed","Approved","Rejected"]), CountIf(CRStakeholderReviews, CRNumber.CRNumber = CRNumber, RAGStatus.Value = "Pale Blue") > 0)))

/*
  Dashboard Screen — OnVisible
  Purpose: Load aggregated programme-level CR statistics for the dashboard tiles.
  Author:  IAG Tech Developer
  Date:    07 Apr 2026
*/
// Use Concurrent for any future additional data calls added to this screen.
Concurrent(
  ClearCollect(colProgrammeStats,
    AddColumns(
      GroupBy(Filter(CRRequests, Not(IsBlank(ProgrammeName))), "ProgrammeName", "CRItems"),
      "Open",         CountIf(CRItems, Not(CRStatus.Value In ["Closed","Rejected","Approved"])),
      "InAssessment", CountIf(CRItems, CRStatus.Value = "In Assessment"),
      "SGReady",      CountIf(CRItems, CRStatus.Value In ["Pre-SG Distribution","SG Review"]),
      "Approved",     CountIf(CRItems, CRStatus.Value = "Approved"),
      "Rejected",     CountIf(CRItems, CRStatus.Value = "Rejected")
    )
  )
)
